title: elatostema japonicum var. involucratum
intro: Elatostema japonicum var. involucratum, also known as the Japanese chain fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Elatostema japonicum var. involucratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
